meta.source: Kent Public Health Observatory — Health and Social Care Maps
meta.refresh_note: KPHO publish new HSCM versions quarterly. Update HSCM_DOWNLOAD_URL in fetch_hscm.py when a new version appears at the source_url above.
meta.fep_recalibration_note: KPHO frailty_pct is GP-recorded Clinical Frailty Scale data. Normalised to 0-100 on Kent scale and blended into FEP at 40% weight. Key corrections: Dartford rises (FEP was underestimating clinical burden); Maidstone falls (prescribing signals overstated vs GP-recorded prevalence).
